_comment: Canonical VibeKB starter-workspace definition. Language-neutral data read by BOTH the Go installer (embedded) and tools/lib/Starter.php (on disk). dirs[] lists every directory a fresh .vibekb/ must contain (including intentionally-empty ones); files under files/ mirror onto the target .vibekb/ with {{DATE}} and {{PROJECT_NAME_JSON}} substituted. Do not hand-duplicate this into code.

tokens.{{PROJECT_NAME_JSON}}: JSON-encoded project name, including surrounding quotes
